note: Falsifiable visual questions for the future multimodal judge (verify-and-evals.md §2.5, §3.5). Unused until the judge lands (phase 6/7). Data binding + edits are checked mechanically at rung 5; these cover static appearance.

questions.ask: Are exactly three task rows visible in a vertical list?
Does the heading show a count of remaining (not-done) tasks?
Is a text field and an Add control visible above the list?
Is at least one task row visually distinct (dimmed/struck) as done?
Is any row's text clipped or overflowing its row?
